_owner: TechBrot Inc. — Certified QuickBooks ProAdvisor team
_methodology: One anonymized row is logged by the engaging ProAdvisor at the CLOSE of every completed QuickBooks cleanup engagement. No client-identifying data is ever stored. Figures are observed, never estimated or modeled. The published page reports the live N and never reports a statistic on a cell with N<20 for that breakdown.

_schema.engagement_id: string — anonymous opaque id, no client linkage
_schema.months_behind_at_intake: integer — months since last reconciled close at intake
_schema.primary_error_types: array<string> — e.g. unreconciled-accounts, miscategorized, duplicate-transactions, opening-balance-equity, undeposited-funds, payroll-liability, sales-tax, file-corruption, bank-feed-gap
_schema.cleanup_hours: number — total ProAdvisor hours to CPA-ready
